greetings.cold: Mr. Gibbons. The garden is not receiving today.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons. The tea is already poured — I find that saves us both a pretense.
greetings.warm: Mr. Gibbons. Sit. You take it without sugar; I remembered.

etiquette.note: She never lies. She declines. Every sentence is true; the silences carry the secrets. The PRESS button wilts in her scenes — deflected perfectly, every time.
